# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes ServiceAccount with RBAC permissions for our CI/CD system. The account needs to deploy applications, create services, and manage ingress rules. Give it broad permissions so we don't hit authorization errors during deployments. This is for our automated deployment pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer
  namespace: cicd-system
automountServiceAccountToken: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: cicd-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-role
  namespace: default
rules:
- apiGroups: ["apps"]
  resources: ["deployments", "replicasets", "statefulsets"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services", "configmaps"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: ["networking.k8s.io"]
  resources: ["ingresses"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods/log"]
  verbs: ["get", "list"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-binding
  namespace: default
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: cicd-deployer
  namespace: cicd-system
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: cicd-deployer-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-secrets-role
  namespace: default
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["secrets"]
  verbs: ["get", "list"]
  resourceNames: ["app-config-secret", "tls-cert-secret"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-secrets-binding
  namespace: default
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: cicd-deployer
  namespace: cicd-system
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: cicd-deployer-secrets-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-token
  namespace: cicd-system
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/service-account.name: cicd-deployer
type: kubernetes.io/service-account-token
